objective: Complete CleanMac real local functionality and localization coverage on a new branch.
exit_condition: The goal is complete when current CleanMac features use real local data instead of fake, demo, placeholder, or hardcoded sample data; incomplete localization has been replaced with resource-backed strings across supported locales with placeholder parity; relevant tests prove the behavior; swift test passes; and checkpoint plus implementation changes are committed.

phases.name: Audit fake data and incomplete localization gaps
Add failing tests for real-data and localization gaps
Implement real-data behavior and localization fixes
Verify with SwiftPM tests and build

current.focus: Goal complete: fake overview/sidebar capacity literals were replaced with real volume or scan data; sidebar, overview, app menu, and menu bar strings use resource-backed localization across all supported locales; full SwiftPM tests pass.
current.next_action: Stop scheduling; implementation and checkpoint are ready for commit.

decisions.reason: The objective is result-driven: real features and complete localization are the explicit end state.

decisions.decision: Use a normal feature branch in the current checkout instead of creating an extra worktree.
decisions.reason: The user explicitly asked to checkout a new branch, and the working tree was clean on main before branching.
CleanMac is package-first, and prior verified workflows use SwiftPM tests and builds.
Real-data behavior and localization fixes should be proven by failing tests before production changes.

decisions.decision: Replace static overview and sidebar capacity numbers with StorageVolumeReporter and scan-derived totals.
decisions.reason: The previous UI showed fixed GB values before a scan, which looked like real functionality but was not sourced from the local machine.

decisions.decision: Move sidebar, overview, edit menu, and menu bar status copy into Localizable.strings.
decisions.reason: Swift-side language branches only covered part of Chinese and left other supported languages falling back to English.

decisions.decision: Use source-level regression tests for fake literals and menu hardcoding in addition to behavior tests.
decisions.reason: The fake-data problem was visible in SwiftUI constants, so source guards make regressions cheap to catch.

decisions.decision: Treat SystemPermissionGuide default English text as model fallback rather than displayed localization.
decisions.reason: PermissionGuideView already renders title, explanation, and instructions through L10n, while tests still validate the raw guide contents for the core model.
